name: Network and Information Systems Regulations 2018
description: UK Network and Information Systems Regulations 2018 — UK implementation of the EU NIS Directive (now superseded by NIS2 in the EU). UK is implementing NIS2-equivalent updates via the Cyber Security and Resilience Bill.
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud service providers may qualify as Relevant Digital Service Providers under UK NIS.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems within scope.

current_extraction.notes: Parsed from UK legislation.gov.uk CLML (Crown Legislation Markup Language) XML for uksi/2018/506. Output: nis-regulations-sections.{csv,json} (30 sections), nis-regulations-schedules.{csv,json} (2 schedules). Section count includes amendments and UK-inserted articles; titles pulled from <Pblock>/<P1group>/<EUChapter> wrapper elements per CLML convention.

extraction_history.reason: Structured extraction from CLML XML at legislation.gov.uk
